task_summary:
**Task:** The manufacturer's coverage on the tablet has ended, but the customer also has an extended three-year warranty that still covers the issue. The right resolution is to recognize that extended coverage controls here and route the claim to repair.

**Challenge:** The difficult part is checking which warranty actually governs the claim. Weak agents see the expired manufacturer term and deny the case, or never look closely enough to notice that the extended plan keeps the repair path open.
opening_message: My tablet from order ORD-6031 won't charge anymore. I bought an extended warranty — is it covered?

user_simulator.user_sim_context: Your tablet stopped charging, and you bought extended coverage because you wanted protection beyond the standard warranty. You expect the agent to look at the full coverage situation rather than stopping at the manufacturer's original term. You want to know whether this issue is still covered and what the next step is.
task_rules: Warranty ID is WRT-4012 if asked.
